notes: Wave1.0 regression for 'you' service. Navigated tab to you.com then mandatory Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload. Page title='보안 정책 - 접근 차단'. Expected_text '차단' visible. Did NOT redirect to /platform developer dashboard — the #1170 FAIL (redirect to /platform, no warning) did NOT recur. Matches #1144 OK baseline (same page-replacement delivery). Verdict=OK.
